1.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
1.kj: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch

1.gl: a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity
1.kj: consecrated (thing), dedicated (thing), hallowed (thing), holiness, ([idiom] most) holy ([idiom] day, portion, thing), saint, sanctuary.

1.gl: properly, instrumental music; by implication, a poem set to notes
Korach, the name of two Edomites and three Israelites

1.dv: from an unused root meaning to loom up;

2.gl: a residence (including a shepherd's hut, the lair of animals, figuratively, the grave; also the Temple); specifically, the Tabernacle (properly, its wooden walls)
Tsijon (as a permanent capital), a mountain of Jerusalem
2.dv: the same (regularly) as H6725 (צִיּוּן)lemma צִיוּן missing dagesh, corrected to צִיּוּן;

2.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
2.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

2.gl: to have affection for (sexually or otherwise)
an opening, i.e. door or gate
2.dv: from H8176 (שָׁעַר) in its original sense;

3.gl: to be heavy, i.e. in a bad sense (burdensome, severe, dull) or in a good sense (numerous, rich, honorable; causatively, to make weighty (in the same two senses)

3.gl: perhaps properly, to arrange; but used figuratively (of words), to speak; rarely (in a destructive sense) to subdue
3.kj: answer, appoint, bid, command, commune, declare, destroy, give, name, promise, pronounce, rehearse, say, speak, be spokesman, subdue, talk, teach, tell, think, use (entreaties), ut

3.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
3.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

3.gl: a city (a place guarded by waking or a watch) in the widest sense (even of a mere encampment or post)
3.kj: Ai (from margin), city, court (from margin), town.
3.dv: or (in the plural) עָר; or עָיַר; (Judges 10:4), from H5782 (עוּר)

4.kj: acknowledge, acquaintance(-ted with), advise, answer, appoint, assuredly, be aware, (un-) awares, can(-not), certainly, comprehend, consider, [idiom] could they, cunning, declare,

4.dv: a primitive root; also as denominative from H2145 (זָכָר)

4.gl: adverb or preposition, with (i.e. in conjunction with), in varied applications; specifically, equally with; often with prepositional prefix (and then usually unrepresented in English)
4.kj: accompanying, against, and, as ([idiom] long as), before, beside, by (reason of), for all, from (among, between), in, like, more than, of, (un-) to, with(-al).

4.gl: there (transferring to time) then; often thither, or thence
4.kj: in it, [phrase] thence, there (-in, [phrase] of, [phrase] out), [phrase] thither, [phrase] whither.
4.dv: a primitive particle (rather from the relative pronoun, H834 (אֲשֶׁר));

4.gl: Cush (or Ethiopia), the name of a son of Ham, and of his territory; also of an Israelite

5.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

6.gl: properly, to score with a mark as a tally or record, i.e. (by implication) to inscribe, and also to enumerate; intensively, to recount, i.e. celebrate
6.kj: commune, (ac-) count; declare, number, [phrase] penknife, reckon, scribe, shew forth, speak, talk, tell (out), writer.

6.gl: there (transferring to time) then; often thither, or thence
6.kj: in it, [phrase] thence, there (-in, [phrase] of, [phrase] out), [phrase] thither, [phrase] whither.
6.dv: a primitive particle (rather from the relative pronoun, H834 (אֲשֶׁר));

6.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
to grave, by implication, to write (describe, inscribe, prescribe, subscribe)
Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
6.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

7.gl: properly, to bore, i.e. (by implication) to wound, to dissolve; figuratively, to profane (a person, place or thing), to break (one's word), to begin (as if by an 'opening wedge'); to play (the flute)
7.kj: begin ([idiom] men began), defile, [idiom] break, defile, [idiom] eat (as common things), [idiom] first, [idiom] gather the grape thereof, [idiom] take inheritance, pipe, player on
7.dv: a primitive root (compare H2470 (חָלָה)); also  denominative (from H2485 (חָלִיל))

7.kj: behold (by mistake for H7789 (שׁוּר)), sing(-er, -ing man, -ing woman).
7.dv: or (the original form) שׁוּר; (1 Samuel 18:6), a primitive root (rather identical with H7788 (שׁוּר) through the idea of strolling minstrelsy);

7.gl: a fountain (also collectively), figuratively, a source (of satisfaction)
7.dv: or מַעְיְנוֹ; (Psalm 114:8), or (feminine) מַעְיָנָה; from H5869 (עַיִן) (as a denominative in the sense of a spring);
